keyPoints: Point 1: Numpy's polyfit function can handle more than two data points.
Point 2: Pandas is used for data manipulation and analysis.
Point 3: Scikit-learn is used for machine learning tasks.
Point 4: Matplotlib is used for creating visualizations.
Point 5: Seaborn is used for more complex visualizations.
Point 6: Data profiling is an important step in data analysis.
Point 7: Data visualization helps in understanding large datasets.
Point 8: Cross-validation is used to evaluate machine learning models.
Point 9: Hyperparameter tuning is an important step in machine learning.
Point 10: Regularization techniques are used to prevent overfitting.
Point 11: Ensemble methods are used to combine multiple models.
Point 12: Model selection is an important step in machine learning.
